title: Eisenhower Decision Matrix
description: Prioritize tasks using the Eisenhower urgent-important matrix
viralHook: Stop doing busy work. Start doing the RIGHT work.

cards.title: DO - Urgent & Important
cards.description: Crisis and deadline-driven tasks that need your immediate personal attention. Handle these first.

cards.title: SCHEDULE - Important, Not Urgent
cards.description: Strategic work that drives long-term success. Block dedicated time on your calendar for these.

cards.title: DELEGATE - Urgent, Not Important
cards.description: Tasks that feel pressing but don't require your unique skills. Hand these off whenever possible.

cards.title: DELETE - Not Urgent, Not Important
cards.description: Time-wasters and distractions that add no real value. Eliminate these ruthlessly.
items: Perfectioning things that are good enough
